creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: jgh
Date: Sun Dec 22 06:02:39 2013
New Revision: 337174
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/337174

Log:
  - update to 1.01 [1]
  - add europe mirror in svnup.conf [2]
  - while here convert to staging
  
  PR:		182149
  Submitted by:	jcm@visi.com (maintainer) [1], mspil.oss@gmail.com [2]

Modified:
  head/net/svnup/Makefile
  head/net/svnup/distinfo
  head/net/svnup/pkg-plist

Modified: head/net/svnup/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/net/svnup/Makefile	Sun Dec 22 03:31:32 2013	(r337173)
+++ head/net/svnup/Makefile	Sun Dec 22 06:02:39 2013	(r337174)
@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	svnup
-PORTVERSION=	1.0
+PORTVERSION=	1.01
 CATEGORIES=	net
 MASTER_SITES=	http://jcm.dsl.visi.com/freebsd/svnup/ \
 		LOCAL/jgh/net/${PORTNAME}/
@@ -14,13 +14,9 @@ LICENSE=	BSD
 LDFLAGS+=	-lmd -lssl
 USE_XZ=	yes
 
-MAN1=	${PORTNAME}.1
-MAN5=	${PORTNAME}.conf.5
-PORTDOCS=	ChangeLog
-
-NO_STAGE=	yes
 post-patch-script:
-	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's|8.3|${OSREL}|' ${WRKSRC}/svnup.conf
+	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's|\/stable\/8|\/stable\/${OSREL:R}|' ${WRKSRC}/svnup.conf
+	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's|\/releng\/8.3|\/releng\/${OSREL}|' ${WRKSRC}/svnup.conf
 
 do-build:
 	cd ${WRKSRC} && \
@@ -29,21 +25,19 @@ do-build:
 .include <bsd.port.options.mk>
 
 do-install:
-	${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKSRC}/${PORTNAME} ${PREFIX}/bin
-	${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/${MAN1} ${MAN1PREFIX}/man/man1
-	${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/${MAN5} ${MAN5PREFIX}/man/man5
+	${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKSRC}/${PORTNAME} ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/bin
+	${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/${PORTNAME}.1 ${STAGEDIR}${MAN1PREFIX}/man/man1
+	${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/${PORTNAME}.conf.5 ${STAGEDIR}${MAN5PREFIX}/man/man5
 
 post-install:
-.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MDOCS}
-	@${MKDIR} ${DOCSDIR}
-	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/ChangeLog ${DOCSDIR}
-.endif
-	@${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/${PORTNAME}.conf ${PREFIX}/etc/${PORTNAME}.conf.sample
-	@if [ ! -e "${PREFIX}/etc/${PORTNAME}.conf" ]; then \
-		${ECHO_MSG} "   Installing local configuration file: ${PREFIX}/etc/${PORTNAME}.conf"; \
-		${CP} ${PREFIX}/etc/${PORTNAME}.conf.sample ${PREFIX}/etc/${PORTNAME}.conf; \
+	@${MKDIR} ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR}
+	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/ChangeLog ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR}
+	@${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/${PORTNAME}.conf ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/etc/${PORTNAME}.conf.sample
+	@if [ ! -e "${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/etc/${PORTNAME}.conf" ]; then \
+		${ECHO_MSG} "   Installing local configuration file: ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/etc/${PORTNAME}.conf"; \
+		${CP} ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/etc/${PORTNAME}.conf.sample ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/etc/${PORTNAME}.conf; \
 	else \
-		${ECHO_MSG} "   Preserving local configuration file: ${ETCDIR}/${PORTNAME}.conf"; \
+		${ECHO_MSG} "   Preserving local configuration file: ${STAGEDIR}${ETCDIR}/${PORTNAME}.conf"; \
 	fi
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/net/svnup/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/net/svnup/distinfo	Sun Dec 22 03:31:32 2013	(r337173)
+++ head/net/svnup/distinfo	Sun Dec 22 06:02:39 2013	(r337174)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (svnup-1.0.tar.xz) = 6d09980a0881e681fabd00c63cabd6f2bb80d3f2cb5f02212297533011e25a97
-SIZE (svnup-1.0.tar.xz) = 18440
+SHA256 (svnup-1.01.tar.xz) = 52d94ca71a46fd8bda9c6a4a042acca4b49413271a3b140db0501cf7051550e2
+SIZE (svnup-1.01.tar.xz) = 18492

Modified: head/net/svnup/pkg-plist
==============================================================================
--- head/net/svnup/pkg-plist	Sun Dec 22 03:31:32 2013	(r337173)
+++ head/net/svnup/pkg-plist	Sun Dec 22 06:02:39 2013	(r337174)
@@ -1,4 +1,6 @@
 bin/svnup
+man/man1/svnup.1.gz
+man/man5/svnup.conf.5.gz
 @unexec if cmp -s %D/etc/svnup.conf.sample %D/etc/svnup.conf; then rm -f %D/etc/svnup.conf; else echo "If permanently removing this package, then please consider removing %D/etc/svnup.conf" ;fi
 etc/svnup.conf.sample
 @exec if [ ! -f %D/etc/svnup.conf ] ; then cp -p %D/etc/svnup.conf.sample %D/etc/svnup.conf; fi
